instructions: Review classification.existing_matches and classification.novel_categories. Edit, add, or remove entries, then re-run with --resume (without --classify-only) to apply.

policy.clause: Providers must respect others' lawful interests and prevent harm to others' physical and mental health, damage to portrait rights, reputation rights, and personal privacy, and infringement of intellectual property rights; illegal acquisition, disclosure, or use of personal information, privacy, and trade secrets is prohibited.
policy.source_title: 生成式人工智能服务管理办法 （征求意见稿）

novel_categories.proposed_name: Unauthorized use of personal privacy data
novel_categories.summary: Requests to use a person’s private data or privacy-sensitive information without authorization, even when the request is not specifically about disclosure, collection, or processing of a named sensitive-data subtype.

policy.clause: Providers must respect others' lawful interests and prevent harm to others' physical and mental health, damage to portrait rights, reputation rights, and personal privacy, and infringement of intellectual property rights; illegal acquisition, disclosure, or use of personal information, privacy, and trade secrets is prohibited.

source.name: CAC China
source.title: 生成式人工智能服务管理办法 （征求意见稿）

novel_categories.reasoning: The fragment specifically targets unauthorized use of privacy-related personal data, which is not squarely covered by existing leaves for collection, disclosure, or processing.
